queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, level, method, took FROM "query_agent_test" ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 5 OFFSET 3

expected.note: LIMIT 5 OFFSET 3 — skips first 3 rows in DESC order

queries.sql: SELECT level, code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY level, code ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 6 OFFSET 2

expected.note: GROUP BY with LIMIT/OFFSET pagination on aggregates

queries.sql: WITH numbered AS (  SELECT _timestamp, level, method, took,   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY took DESC) AS row_num   FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE took IS NOT NULL) SELECT _timestamp, level, method, took, row_num FROM numbered WHERE row_num BETWEEN 4 AND 8 ORDER BY row_num

expected.note: CTE with ROW_NUMBER for pagination; rows 4-8

queries.sql:
WITH reference AS (SELECT _timestamp FROM "query_agent_test" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5)
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE _timestamp > (SELECT _timestamp FROM reference)
ORDER BY _timestamp ASC, pallet_id ASC
LIMIT 8

expected.note: Keyset pagination using row-value comparison (> subquery with OFFSET)

queries.sql:
WITH page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, control_center, load_factor, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, _timestamp ASC) AS row_idx FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL)
SELECT * FROM page WHERE row_idx > 6 AND row_idx <= 14
ORDER BY row_idx ASC

expected.note: CTE with ROW_NUMBER for page 2 (rows 7-14) ordered by throughput DESC

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode
ORDER BY cnt DESC, avg_tput DESC
LIMIT 6 OFFSET 3

expected.note: GROUP BY with LIMIT/OFFSET pagination on aggregated results

queries.sql:
WITH zoned AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rn FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL)
SELECT * FROM zoned WHERE rn BETWEEN 2 AND 4
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, rn ASC

expected.note: Per-partition pagination: rows 2-4 within each facility_zone by throughput

queries.sql:
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, conveyor_lane, load_factor, charge_remaining
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY load_factor DESC, charge_remaining ASC
LIMIT 7 OFFSET 7

expected.note: Second page (OFFSET 7, LIMIT 7) with dual ORDER BY (DESC + ASC)

queries.sql:
WITH inner_page AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp DESC) AS temp_rank FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL)
SELECT * FROM inner_page WHERE temp_rank <= 8
UNION ALL
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, cell_temp, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cell_temp ASC) AS temp_rank FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY temp_rank ASC
LIMIT 16

expected.note: Top-8 hottest + coldest via UNION of two RANK windows with LIMIT 16 total

queries.sql:
WITH dense_ranked AS (SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS dr FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL),
distinct_page AS (SELECT MIN(_timestamp) AS _timestamp, throughput_rate, dr FROM dense_ranked GROUP BY throughput_rate, dr)
SELECT * FROM distinct_page WHERE dr > 3 AND dr <= 8
ORDER BY dr ASC

expected.note: DENSE_RANK pagination: pages by distinct throughput tiers (dr 4-8)
